title: Easy Obsidian
description:
Obsidian is annoying to get.
This mod makes it craftable from cobbled deepslate.
body:
Gathering obsidian is one of the most tedious and boring things in minecraft, but this mod gives an easier alternative. 
With this mod, you can craft obsidian from 9 cobbled deepslate, making it much more easier to obtain.
This mod is completely server-side, so if you have a server, you won't need to worry about your players having to download the mod.
